seoTitle: Spring ISD Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & Printable PDF
seoDescription: Spring ISD 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 28 last day, fall break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, printable PDF, ICS, and Google Calendar download.
pageHeading: Spring ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
calendarNotes: Spring ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 28, 2027. Fall Break runs October 12-16, Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Mid-Winter Break runs February 15-19, and Spring Break runs March 15-19.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Spring ISD school start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Spring ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Spring ISD have a Spanish calendar for 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Spring ISD publishes a Spanish version of the 2026-2027 instructional calendar, linked as an alternate calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in Spring ISD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The Spring ISD 2026-2027 calendar includes 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Spring ISD have early release days?
calendarFaqs.a: Families should check the official Spring ISD calendar and campus announcements for early release dates, dismissal-time changes, and school-specific schedule notes.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can parents check emergency Spring ISD school closures?
calendarFaqs.a: This page shows planned calendar dates only. For weather closures, emergency cancellations, same-day changes, and campus-specific updates, families should check official Spring ISD announcements.

customSections.label: Spring ISD Calendar 2026-2027 Overview
customSections.content:
The Spring ISD 2026-2027 school calendar is the districtwide academic calendar for Spring Independent School District families in north Harris County and the greater Houston area.

It includes the first day of school, last day of school, semester and grading-period markers, school holidays, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Mid-Winter Break, Spring Break, report card distribution dates, and end-of-year dates.

Families can use this Spring ISD academic calendar to plan school attendance, transportation, childcare, appointments, athletics, travel, summer activities, and other school-year routines. The calendar includes 180 instructional days.

This page organizes the official Spring ISD calendar into key dates, a printable PDF source, an importable calendar file, and a student-focused date list so parents can quickly find Spring ISD school holidays, no-school dates, important dates, and break periods without searching through the full PDF.

customSections.label: About Spring Independent School District
customSections.content:
Spring Independent School District is a public school district serving students and families in Spring, Texas, north Harris County, and the greater Houston metropolitan area. This calendar page focuses on the districtwide Spring ISD instructional calendar used for school-year planning by students, parents, staff, and community members.

Families should use this page for official-calendar organization and quick planning, then confirm campus-specific schedules, Spring Early College Academy adjustments, testing dates, athletics, performances, graduation details, emergency closures, and dismissal-time changes directly with Spring ISD or their assigned campus.

customSections.label: Important Spring ISD Dates Explained
customSections.content: These Spring ISD dates are the main planning points families should save because they affect student attendance, childcare, transportation, vacation timing, and campus routines.

rows: First Day of School
August 12, 2026
First student attendance day for confirming transportation schedules, school supply lists, campus announcements, and pickup routines.
Fall Break
October 12-16, 2026
A full school-week break that families often use for childcare coverage, appointments, or short trips.
Thanksgiving Break
November 23-27, 2026
A full holiday week that can affect travel plans, childcare, and family schedules.
Winter Break
December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027
The main mid-year holiday period before students return for the spring semester on January 5, 2027.
Mid-Winter Break
February 15-19, 2027
A February break week that can affect childcare, appointments, athletics, and school activity planning.
Spring Break
A common family travel and appointment-planning week for Spring ISD students.
Last Day of School
Anchor date for summer childcare, camps, travel, and end-of-year planning.

customSections.label: Spring ISD Printable PDF vs Calendar File
customSections.content: Spring ISD families can use either the printable school calendar PDF or the calendar file depending on how they prefer to save school dates.

rows: Printable PDF
Printing, sharing, and keeping a paper copy at home
Use the official Spring ISD PDF when you want the district's published calendar layout.
Calendar File (.ics)
Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, and personal scheduling apps
Import the calendar file to save reviewed Spring ISD dates, but verify official updates because it is not a live district sync.
Official Calendar Page
Checking revisions, Spanish calendars, campus notes, and emergency updates
Use Spring ISD as the source of record before making time-sensitive plans.

customSections.label: How We Verify Spring ISD Calendar Information
customSections.content:
MySchoolDates reviews the official Spring ISD printable calendars page and published district calendar PDF, compares key dates such as first day, last day, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Mid-Winter Break, Spring Break, grading-period dates, report card distribution dates, and district holidays, then converts the reviewed records into the calendar file used on this page.

The official Spring ISD calendar remains the source of record for revisions, campus-specific events, emergency closures, and same-day announcements. For more detail, see the MySchoolDates calendar verification methodology.

customSections.label: Parent Questions About the Spring ISD Calendar
customSections.content: These parent-focused answers cover school holidays, no-school days, early release checks, and unexpected schedule changes. They are visible page content and do not replace the official Spring ISD calendar.

rows: Does Spring ISD have school on holidays?
Spring ISD schools are closed on district holidays and scheduled break dates listed in the official instructional calendar.
Are Spring ISD teacher workdays student holidays?
Teacher workdays and professional development days are generally no-student days when listed on the official district calendar.
When does Spring ISD summer break start?
Summer break begins after the final student day on Friday, May 28, 2027.
Does Spring ISD have school tomorrow?
This page shows planned calendar dates only. For tomorrow-specific attendance, weather closures, emergency cancellations, or same-day updates, families should check official Spring ISD announcements.
Is the Spring ISD calendar the same for every campus?
This page summarizes the districtwide instructional calendar. Individual campuses may have schedule notes or adjustments families should confirm with Spring ISD.
